opportunities.label: Online Scheduling Automation
opportunities.signal: Pioneer has no booking button, no contact form, and is phone-only for all inquiries.
opportunities.observation: Boise customers searching after hours are booking competitors with instant online scheduling instead.
opportunities.fix: Deploy an AI booking widget capturing HVAC service requests 24/7 without requiring a phone call.

opportunities.label: Maintenance Reminder Automation
opportunities.signal: No email marketing tools detected and no loyalty or recurring service signals on the site.
opportunities.observation: Pioneer is leaving seasonal tune-up revenue on the table with no automated customer touchpoints.
opportunities.fix: Automate spring cooling and fall heating reminder campaigns to past customers driving predictable recurring revenue.

opportunities.label: Call Capture CRM
opportunities.signal: No CRM or marketing tools detected; all contact is phone-only with zero digital capture infrastructure.
opportunities.observation: Every missed or unbooked call from a Boise homeowner is permanently lost with no follow-up possible.
opportunities.fix: Implement AI call capture that logs caller info, intent, and triggers automatic follow-up sequences for unconverted leads.
